Tests, fake implementations, stubs, and infrastructure for Pebble firmware components and libraries.

## Folders
- **[fakes](fakes/README.md)**: Fake implementations for testing various components of the Pebble firmware, including services, storage, and communication.
- **[fakes_tests](fakes/README.md_tests)**: Tests for fake mutex implementation and build script for running these tests using `clar`.
- **[fixtures](fixtures/README.md)**: Tests and C functions for activity data, JavaScript test files, resource definitions, and resource loading functions.
- **[fw](fw/README.md)**: Tests and build scripts for Pebble firmware components, including Bluetooth, graphics, UI, kernel, and utilities.
- **[libc](libc/README.md)**: Tests for C standard library functions in math, printf, string, and time categories.
- **[libutil](libutil/README.md)**: Unit tests for circular buffer, cache, CRC32, list, math, sort, string, struct, UUID, and build script.
- **[overrides](overrides/README.md)**: Header files, macros, functions, and constants for testing Bluetooth storage, board configurations, protocols, and more.
- **[stubs](stubs/README.md)**: Stub functions and implementations for testing various components and services in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_includes](test_includes/README.md)**: Defines assertion and mocking macros for testing, including typed assertions and error handling.
- **[test_infra](test_infra/README.md)**: Functions for header overrides, tests for header inclusion, and a build script for test infrastructure.
- **[vendor](vendor/README.md)**: Memory management and debugging tools, build scripts, licenses, and documentation for the DUMA library.

## Files
- **[pebble_asserts.h](pebble_asserts.h.md)**: Assertions for comparing equality of GRect, GPoint, GSize, Uuid, and EllipsisDrawConfig objects.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: A build script for managing test image conversions, test execution options, and code coverage in the Pebble firmware project.
